task_description: Build Verbum — a greenfield Catholic content management platform within the existing musicalizer monorepo. Backend (FastAPI/Python) + Frontend (React/Vite/TypeScript) as new sibling directories.

patterns.ui_component: Each component uses CVA for variants, cn() utility from clsx+twMerge, forwardRef pattern, data-slot attributes. Files: ComponentName.tsx + index.tsx re-export.
patterns.tailwind_theme: CSS custom properties (--primary, --background, etc.) for theming. Dark mode via 'selector' class on html element.
patterns.api_router: FastAPI APIRouter with prefix and tags. All handlers async def. Use lifespan context manager for startup/shutdown.
patterns.service_layer: Python Protocol classes for interfaces. Dependency injection via FastAPI Depends(). Provider pattern for swappable implementations.
patterns.streaming: SSE via FastAPI StreamingResponse with 'data: JSON\n\n' format. Frontend consumes via ReadableStream reader.
patterns.data_models: SQLModel for combined Pydantic+SQLAlchemy. String enums. UUID string primary keys. datetime.now(timezone.utc) for timestamps.
patterns.error_handling: Wrap all external API calls in try/except with specific error types. Auto-fallback for validation providers.

existing_implementations.ui_components: prototypes-magic/src/components/ui/ has full library: Button, Card, Tabs, Badge, Input, Select, Textarea, Table, Progress, Accordion, Label, Separator, Slider, ScrollArea, Sonner, ToggleGroup, Tooltip
existing_implementations.cn_utility: src/components/ui/utils.ts and prototypes-magic have cn() = twMerge(clsx(inputs))
existing_implementations.musicalizer_app: Existing Next.js app with Prisma/PostgreSQL for music tracks — completely separate domain, do NOT modify

critical_constraints: NotebookLM (notebooklm-py) is UNOFFICIAL and HIGH RISK — must implement fallback validation provider
No API keys in frontend code — all AI calls go through backend
Portuguese-first UI and content — all SEO tooling targets PT
Single-user only — no auth, no multi-tenancy
Use async everywhere — async FastAPI, AsyncSession with aiosqlite
Copy (not symlink) UI components from prototypes-magic to frontend/src/components/ui/
Anthropic API requires explicit model parameter — no default
Use Chat Completions API for OpenAI (not Responses API)
